messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-489 — Active-set id join is case-asymmetric: an upper-cased stage-map key vs a verbatim yaml id silently drops a mis-cased held ticket from the board
What it solves: ORIGIN — BL-474 audit finding #4. A real, latent tracking-defect: an asymmetric case-normalization across
the two sides of the active-set join silently drops a held ticket with no error.
Approval context: Clear latent tracking-defect fix mandated by BL-474; new feature file, so flagging for review. FIRM: the active-set id side of the filter-active join is upper-cased to match the stage-map key side, so a mis-cased backlog/active yaml id can no longer silently drop a held ticket from the board. Low p…
BL-489 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-489" (or "reject BL-489 <reason>") to act.
